title: 第 28 課｜非簡諧振盪：頻率隨振幅改變｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
小振盪只保留二次項；保留更高次項就進入非簡諧（非線性）振盪。本課把拉格朗日量展開到 x³、x⁴，運動方程變成 ẍ + ω₀²x = −αx² − βx³，並用逐次逼近法求解。兩個新現象：波形不再是純正弦、會生出 2ω、3ω 的泛音；更重要的是頻率隨振幅改變 ω = ω₀ + κa²。影片以波形變形與不同振幅振子逐漸失步的動畫呈現。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 28 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 28 | Anharmonic Oscillations: Amplitude-Dependent Frequency | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
Small-oscillation theory keeps only quadratic terms; keeping higher terms gives anharmonic (non-linear) oscillations. Expanding the Lagrangian to x³ and x⁴, the equation becomes ẍ + ω₀²x = −αx² − βx³, solved by successive approximation. Two new effects appear: the waveform is no longer a pure sine and gains overtones at 2ω and 3ω; and, more importantly, the frequency depends on amplitude, ω = ω₀ + κa². Animated with the distorted waveform and two different-amplitude oscillators drifting out of step.

Lesson 28 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
